title: Playground Pocket Workshop
concept: A mobile-first compact shell for educators running workshops: the first viewport is a thumb-reachable runboard with save state, path navigation, start actions, and a bottom navigation model that scales up beside a desktop preview.
flows: Use the first viewport to navigate the active WordPress path, refresh, open Homepage or WP Admin, confirm save state, and start common workshop sources.
Create Playgrounds from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PRs, Gutenberg PRs or branches, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, featured Blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery.
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible progress, then manage saved and unsaved entries with rename and delete actions.
Use bottom navigation to move between runtime settings, saved management, Site Manager files, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, and gallery filters.
Export work to GitHub, download a Playground zip, copy or download Blueprint bundles, run Blueprints, and download database.sqlite.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and stored Save and Reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
